summary: Enthusiastic fans praise the communal vibe and a memorable Masterpiece performance, with an overall good‑quality recording despite no detailed technical notes.
review: Both reviewers rate this tape five stars, highlighting the unique atmosphere of the Wisconsin “Dust Bowl” show and recalling a powerful rendition of "Masterpiece." While no specific comments on soundboard or audience source are provided, the high ratings imply the audio is at least listenable and enjoyable. The performance is remembered as a communal milestone rather than a technically dissected set.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews emphasize the show’s vibe and a standout song, suggesting a solid performance; lack of recording details keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention specific sound issues or source type; high praise implies the recording is acceptable and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
